codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature description. 16 session logs consolidated into MEMORY.md with new 'Operational Learnings' section. All .md session files deleted, .gitkeep preserved. Menu table and payment rules removed (duplicated content). However, some borderline duplications exist: 'Pickup wajib QRIS' rule and alias entries appear in both MEMORY.md and SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md, though in different contexts/formats.

issues.description: Borderline duplication: 'Pickup wajib QRIS â€” tidak boleh COD' in MEMORY.md matches the same rule in SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md (under Pembayaran). The feature description says to remove duplicated content, but this entry in MEMORY.md serves as an operational gotcha reminder rather than just a rule copy. May want to either remove the duplicate or rephrase to reference only.

Borderline duplication: alias mappings (kopsuâ†’Es Kopi Susu Original, amerâ†’Americano, coklatâ†’Chocolate, latteâ†’Caffe Latte, matchaâ†’Matcha Latte, tehâ†’Teh) are already in the alias column of SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md menu table. The feature description says to remove duplicates, but the narrative format in MEMORY.md serves the 'alias handling insights' learning purpose.
ambigu' (MEMORY.md line 70) overlaps with SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md menu table note 'capuccino (ambigu:
â†’ klarifikasi)'. The MEMORY.md version adds operational context about clarifying with customer.

sharedStateObservations.observation: features.json specifies skillName 'config-worker', but no corresponding SKILL.md exists in .factory/skills/. The worker proceeded using base tools (Read, Create, Execute, TodoWrite, LS) without a skill file to reference.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: jq output shows skillName: 'config-worker', but ls .factory/skills/ returns only 'backend-worker' and 'frontend-worker' subdirectories. No config-worker/ directory.

summary: Feature implementation passes. memory/ directory contains only .gitkeep (VAL-MEM-002 âś…). MEMORY.md contains 594 words of organized operational learnings under 'Operational Learnings' with subsections (QRIS Payment Gotchas, Order Flow Insights, Alias Handling Insights, Formatting Preferences, Edge Cases, Critical Rules) â€” no raw transcripts (VAL-MEM-001 âś…). The worker removed the menu table and payment rules that were duplicated from SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md. Some borderline content overlaps exist (Pickup QRIS rule, alias mappings, 'cap' ambiguity) but these are presented in distinct contexts/formats. No blocking issues found.
